LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelMawEmbryo.description: An immature tunnel organ that will grow into a flesh tunnel maw.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelMawEmbryo.label: flesh tunnel maw embryo
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCystEmbryo.description: An immature bioelectric organ that will grow into a galvanic cyst.
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCystEmbryo.label: galvanic cyst embryo
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGlandEmbryo.description: An immature geyser organ that will grow into a geoferrite gland.
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGlandEmbryo.label: geoferrite gland embryo
